raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to address an issue regarding the purchase of XXXX tickets from XXXX. I used my XXXX XXXX  and email on my phone for this transaction. The XXXX provided these tickets through a third party, and despite following their instructions, I was unable to retrieve the tickets via the application. 

I had also purchased refund insurance, which allows for cancellation at any time. Consequently, I contacted both the XXXX and XXXX  XXXX XXXX to request either an alternative method to receive the tickets or a refund. They provided instructions and a URL for the refund process, but I was unable to obtain the refund. 

Determined to attend the event, I purchased additional tickets. I continued to email both organizations, as neither website offers a support phone number. I have attached all related communications to this email. 

Subsequently, I requested a refund from my credit card company, which was approved and issued. During this period, my wife XXXX XXXX to our daughter and underwent XXXX, which occupied my attention. As a result, I missed the notification on the app. Additionally, when I registered with the online app, I was set to paperless, so I did not receive any letters by mail. 

I have contacted Citi multiple times regarding this matter. Each time, they open a case and provide the same update, stating that I am not eligible for a refund for the charge because I responded XXXX  days late to their notification to submit support documents and I had done that initially when I request the dispute as well.
